hooks.command: claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -p 'Read the current state of the pokopedia-tracker project at /mnt/c/tools/ai-vault/vault/projects/pokopedia-tracker. Check recent git log, look at key source files, and update .claude/CLAUDE.md to reflect: what is currently working, what was recently fixed, and what is still pending (from the known issues list). Keep the same CLAUDE.md structure.' 2>/dev/null || true
